metadata.description: Build headless automation and agentic workflows with Google's Gemini CLI

plugins.name: mastering-gemini-cli
plugins.description: Build headless automation and agentic workflows with Google's Gemini CLI. Covers approval modes (default, auto_edit, yolo), file permission model, Edit vs WriteFile tool selection, smartEdit configuration, GEMINI.md context files, settings.json hierarchy, and MCP server integration.
